zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Berwick Melton Jr於1599年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，他的父親Thomas Berwick Milton29歲，母親Margaret Elizabeth Ross23歲。他於1625年與Hannah Wallingston在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1670年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可享年71歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Berwick Melton Jr于1599年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷时，他的父亲Thomas Berwick Milton29岁，母亲Margaret Elizabeth Ross23岁。他于1625年与Hannah Wallingston在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1670年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州諾福爾可享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Melton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middleton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Berwick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name primarily from Berwick-on-Tweed, on the Northumbrian coast at the mouth of the Tweed river, a border town that regularly changed hands between the Scots and the English. Also from any of the places called Berwick in Dorset and elsewhere, Berrick in Oxfordshire, Barwick in Norfolk and Yorkshire, or Barricks in High Easter, Essex. This could also be a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) outlying grange’, from Middle English ber(e)wik ‘outlying grange or farm, demesne farm’ (Old English berewīc ‘barley farm’).

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Berwick Melton Jr was born in 1599, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, his father, Thomas Berwick Milton, was 29 and his mother, Margaret Elizabeth Ross, was 23. He married Hannah Wallingston in 1625, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1670, in Norfolk, Virginia, British Colonial America, at the age of 71.

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Berwick Melton Jr(이)가 1599년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Berwick Milton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Elizabeth Ross(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1625년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Hannah Wallingston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1670년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 노르폴크에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Berwick Melton Jr родился в 1599 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Berwick Milton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Elizabeth Ross, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Wallingston в 1625 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1670 г. в местности норфолк, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год.
